title: Reborn Storage
description: Refined Storage add-on adding multi-block crafters and larger disks
body:
Refined Storage add-on adding multi-block crafters and larger disks 

The first thing we added was a multi-block pattern crafter. It works just the same as it did back in AE 1. 

The max size is 16x16 and it must have at least one CPU and one storage block.

  • Adding more CPUs to the multiblock will speed the crafting up.
  • Adding more storage blocks will allow you to store more patterns.
  • Adding larger storage disks for both items & fluids

Credits:

Modmuss50 - Code

Gigabit101 - Code + Textures
